inputs.label: Temperature (°C)
inputs.businessContext: Dry-bulb temperature of the saturated air parcel at the level of interest.

inputs.label: Pressure (hPa)
inputs.businessContext: Atmospheric pressure at the level of interest (e.g., sea level pressure).

inputs.label: Gravity (m/s²)
inputs.businessContext: Acceleration due to gravity; standard value used unless high precision required.

inputs.label: Latent heat of vaporization (J/kg)
inputs.businessContext: Latent heat of vaporization of water; varies slightly with temperature but constant assumed.

inputs.label: Gas constant dry air (J/(kg·K))
inputs.businessContext: Specific gas constant for dry air.

inputs.label: Specific heat dry air (J/(kg·K))
inputs.businessContext: Specific heat at constant pressure for dry air.

inputs.label: ε (ratio of gas constants)
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of gas constant of dry air to water vapor, ≈0.622.
